hero.headline: Protect Any Document From Forgery
hero.subheadline: Vertifile creates tamper-proof digital documents with live animated verification stamps. Zero access to your content — total privacy.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to protect any document
howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.step1desc: Upload any document — PDF, image, or text file
howItWorks.step2desc: System computes a unique hash without reading content
howItWorks.step3desc: Animated holographic stamp is embedded in the document
howItWorks.step4desc: Download your .pvf file — tamper-proof and verifiable

features.title: Why Vertifile
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade document protection
features.label: Features
features.f1desc: We never read or store your document content. Only a cryptographic fingerprint is processed.
features.f2desc: Every document hash is registered on blockchain for immutable verification.
features.f3desc: Animated holographic stamp that rotates in real-time — impossible to forge.
features.f4desc: Any modification instantly freezes the stamp and marks the document as forged.
features.f5desc: .pvf files open in any browser — no special software needed.
features.f6desc: Works with PDF, images, text files and more. Any file can be protected.

security.label: Security
security.title: 8 Layers of Protection
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security that makes forgery mathematically impossible.
security.s1desc: SHA-256 + HMAC digital signature on every document
security.s2desc: Immutable record on Polygon — exists forever
security.s3desc: Prevents screen recordings and replay attacks
security.s4desc: Detects tampering tools, editors, and DevTools

demo.title: See It In Action
demo.label: Live Demo
demo.subtitle: A real university diploma protected by Vertifile

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free — upgrade as you grow
pricing.label: Pricing

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Documents?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of organizations that trust Vertifile for document security.

footer.description: Tamper-proof digital documents with live animated verification stamps. Zero access to your content.

upload.cardSubtitle: Upload a PDF, image or text file — the system will protect it and return a .pvf file
upload.privacyDesc: The system never reads or stores your document content. It only computes a unique fingerprint and magnetizes the file.
upload.dropMain: Drag a file here or click to select
upload.dropSub: PDF, image (JPG/PNG), or text file — up to 50MB
upload.successDesc: The document is protected and cryptographically signed. Send it to the recipient — only the .pvf file will be accepted.

verify.subtitle: Upload a .pvf file to verify its authenticity
verify.dropMain: Drag a .pvf file here or click to select
verify.verifiedDesc: This document has been verified against the blockchain registry. The stamp is live and valid.
verify.failedDesc: This document could not be verified. It may have been tampered with or is not registered.
